King Roofing Service

The Expert Roofing Contractor Southwest Florida Trusts

  • Celebrating 45 Years in Business
  • Long Tenured. Locally Owned
  • Fully Licensed and Insured
  • Guaranteed Satisfaction
About Us

Trusted Roofing Excellence Since 1979

King Roofing Service Inc. serves as the roofing contractor for Naples, FL and the surrounding region since 1979. We’ve weathered Florida hurricanes and more for the past four decades. As one of the longest-tenured locally owned roofing contractors, we’ve built a great reputation for quality workmanship.

We are so confident with our expertise and quality of work performed by our roofing crews and supervisors, we offer a 5-year transferable workmanship warranty on every new roof we install for your protection and peace of mind.

Learn More
Services

Roofing Services for Every Need

From installations to repairs, our full spectrum of roofing solutions ensures your home is covered, secure, and stylish.

Testimonials

Hear It From Our Clients

Real stories of resilience and satisfaction – our clients share their experiences with King Roofing’s unmatched service and quality.

View More
Michael Hyder
20:57 02 Jun 25
I recently purchased a home in Naples which had a few cement shingles that were broken. I called King Roofing for repairs and do a full inspection of the roof. Eva the office manger had Joe come out for an estimate. The repairs were taken care of promptly and I am so please with their work. I highly recommend King Roofing for any roofing repairs. Thank you Eva and Joe.Mike Hyder
paul dernbach
20:24 21 Mar 25
Excellent repair and prompt service.Very happy.
don strumillo
19:15 18 Dec 24
King roofing was very good to work with! They were very professional in their evaluation and quotation, and then in the execution of the repair repairs for our roof. We highly recommend them!
Brian Lange
14:05 04 Nov 24
Had a great experience with King Roofing recently after having a troublesome leak caused by another contractor two years ago that finally showed itself. Joe and his team showed up when they said they would and painstakingly kept searching for the leak source.I never once had to call to see if they would show up, the crew was very courteous and thorough and i am certain that the cause of the leak was repaired correctly. Pricing was also reasonable for the work that was done.Would highly recommend them and use again if needed.
edward z
13:55 26 Oct 24
ItHas been a few years since my roof was done but every time I come down to see my home in Florida I see the beautiful job that King roofing did. I believe the crew supervisor was Jason Zelner and he was great to communicate with and get the job done and make suggestions to make a good choice.
Nelson Romero
16:23 15 Aug 24
Excellent customer experience! I highly recommend King Roofing. Wonderful team from start to finish.
Stephen Cooke
15:06 26 Jul 24
King roofing is a top notch company. They installed my roof over six years ago after hurricane Irma. I am very happy with the work they did. They are, professional, honest, and customer oriented. I highly recommend them.
Peter Przekop
10:55 08 Jul 24
Prompt response, easy to work with.
Randall Harris
22:53 24 Jun 24
After more then 20 years of excellent service, For our family and friends, King is truly King of Roofing
geobelster
13:52 16 Jun 24
Awesome service! Excellent people! I called an independent roof inspector to evaluate and recommend any repair that might be needed on my tile roof prior to the hurricane season. I already knew what needed to be repaired but wanted to get their opinion. Based on the Google reviews, I called king roofing and Gina told me she would get Jeremy to come out and inspect the roof. A few days later I get an email to confirm the inspection. Jeremy inspects the roof tells me what he thinks need to be repaired and a day later I get the estimate. Compared to the other quotes I got, they were half the cost of the lowest quote and others were triple the estimate. After I approved the repair, they sent a crew with all the material they could possibly need. It took them 6 hours and it was a very detailed job. I was getting a roof home inspection again so I called Gina and asked if this repair would pass a roof inspection. I was transferred to Joe (the master roofer) he said he would stop by and take a look. Next day Joe comes over and inspects the roof and all is good. The original roof inspector reinspected the roof and mentioned they had done an excellent job. Thank you, King Roofing Team. ␀
David Halbert
16:44 14 May 24
Good service. Friendly workers. Responds quickly to demands Thank you.
Bob Vukovic
12:50 30 Apr 24
Excellent communication, fair pricing, good quaility work. My overall experience with the project was fantastic.
Mark Mahal
16:40 13 Apr 24
High quality efficient re-roofing. The roof looks great. Even our neighbors are impressed by the care of the crew and the appearance of the final product. Great communication and followup. Also, a fair price.
Ron Beeber
23:47 07 Apr 24
I needed an inspection and minor roof repairs. Received a timely response and personal inspection from an experienced professional. Received "before" and "after" photos. It's a very professional roofing firm that has a staff that's worked for them for quite a few years. I think it's well worth giving them an opportunity to do business with you.
Bill Silvestri
19:20 28 Mar 24
Very professional and paid attention to details, very informative
LDM
11:53 09 Mar 24
We have been using King Roofing for several years and they are always professional, prompt and have reasonable pricing. They also do a nice job on my roofing projects. We will continue to use them on our older home.
Ted Anderson
17:37 26 Jan 24
I purchased a house in Naples Sept. 2020. The roof had been installed 3 years before I purchased the house. The company who installed it tried to fix the leak 4 times. It still leaked. I asked around and found out that King Roofing was the best. I called them and Bill King came out went up on the roof and diagnosed the problem and gave me an estimate, reasonable price, I accepted his crew came out 2 weeks later. They found bad flashing rotted decking and poor quality workmanship. They fixed all the problems. I waited for heavy rains and looked for leaks, there were none. I gave it another 6 months still no leaks. I highly recomend King Roofing for all your roofing needs.
Mike Fiorito
00:32 31 Dec 23
King roofing did a great job with my installation. My service representative was knowledgeable, friendly and above and beyond what anyone would expect. Priced better than the local competitors. Phone representative friendly and very helpful. Company owner also was knowledgeable and very pleasant to communicate with. Would recommend king roofing to friends and family or anyone in need of their services.

  • Contact Us

King Roofing is proud to support our Veterans! We’re offering a 10% discount (up to $250) on all roof repairs and a 5% discount (up to $1,000) on new roof replacements for Veterans. Thank you for your service! Contact us today to schedule your roofing project.

Request an Estimate
